title: GatewayReceipt v1
description: Machine-readable schema for a signed fiat-to-credit or credit-to-fiat crossing performed by a trusted prepaid gateway node. The signed surface uses `orbiplex-gateway-receipt-v1\x00 || deterministic_cbor(payload_without_signature)`.

receipt/id.description: Stable identifier of the gateway receipt.

gateway/node-id.description: Trusted gateway node that performed the external settlement crossing.

direction.description: Direction of value crossing the protocol boundary. `inbound` credits a local account, `outbound` debits it for payout.

external/amount.description: Gross amount observed on the external payment rail before any explicit ingress fee is applied.

external/currency.description: External settlement currency or tender symbol.

internal/amount.description: Net amount credited or debited to `account/id` in internal minor units.

internal/currency.description: Internal settlement unit used by the supervised ledger in MVP.

account/id.description: Local supervised account affected by the gateway event.

ts.description: Timestamp when the gateway event was committed for audit.

external/payment-ref.description: Gateway-side payment reference such as a PSP transaction id or bank transfer reference.

gateway-policy/ref.description: Gateway policy under which this boundary crossing was executed.

fee/external-amount.description: Explicit fee amount deducted from the gross external amount.

fee/rate.description: Fee rate applied to the gross external amount.

fee/destination-account-id.description: Ledger account that received the internal fee portion, typically the `community-pool`.

net/external-amount.description: External amount remaining after explicit fee deduction.

rate/applied.description: Applied conversion rate from one external unit into internal minor units.

internal/fee-amount.description: Internal minor-unit amount credited to the fee destination account.

external/provider.description: Payment service provider or banking rail label used by the gateway.

exchange-policy/ref.description: Optional reference to the gateway-side pricing or exchange policy in force for this event.

signature.description: Gateway node signature over the receipt payload.
